<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ReplacementReport</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">source_epub</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">coerce_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">output</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">coerce_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">validate_epub_package</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span>
    <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">is_effective_rewrite</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">rewrite_options</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Validate option combinations before any manifest or package IO so that</span>
    <span class="c1"># scope/flag errors surface as ValidationError rather than manifest errors.</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">validate_rewrite_options</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">rewrite_options</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">manifest_available</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extraction_manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">needs_manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content_scope</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;replacement-manifest&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">with</span> <span class="n">zipfile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ZipFile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source_names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">namelist</span><span class="p">()</span>

        <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="n">manifest_hrefs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">needs_manifest</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extraction_manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">validate_source_manifest_hash</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">manifest_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_manifest_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">manifest_hrefs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">unique_manifest_xhtml_hrefs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">detect_duplicate_blocks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Fast path: no block replacements and no effective rewrite.</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">copy_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ReplacementReport</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">output</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
                <span class="n">unchanged_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_names</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">replacement_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">report</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">output_rewrite</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective_noop_report</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">load_package_model</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">report</span>

        <span class="n">package_model</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">package_model</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_package_model</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Block replacements -&gt; byte overlays keyed by archive name.</span>
        <span class="n">overlays</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_compute_block_overlays</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest_index</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Output rewrite composes on top of block overlays via an overlay-aware reader.</span>
        <span class="n">rewrite_report</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">OutputRewriteReport</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">effective_rewrite</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">package_model</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

            <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">entry_reader</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bytes</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">:</span>
                    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">]</span>
                <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">)</span>

            <span class="n">rewrite_overlays</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rewrite_report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">apply_output_rewrite</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">package_model</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">rewrite_options</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">entry_reader</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">manifest_hrefs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">manifest_hrefs</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">update</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">rewrite_overlays</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">rewrite_options</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">package_model</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="n">rewrite_report</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">effective_noop_report</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">package_model</span><span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># No effective change -&gt; byte-identical copy.</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">copy_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ReplacementReport</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">output</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[],</span>
                <span class="n">unchanged_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_names</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">replacement_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rewrite_report</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="c1"># Scan final changed text for unresolved tokens before writing.</span>
        <span class="n">changed_text_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">data</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_text_entry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="n">changed_text_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fail_on_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ensure_no_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">changed_text_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>

            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">rewrite_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">changed_entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_names</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">unchanged_entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_names</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">name</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ReplacementReport</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">output</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">changed_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">unchanged_entries</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">unchanged_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">replacement_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">plan</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">unresolved_token_count</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">output_rewrite</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rewrite_report</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_compute_block_overlays</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">archive</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">zipfile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ZipFile</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">manifest_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">bytes</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Apply block replacements and return archive-keyed byte overlays.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">raw_text_cache</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">entry_changes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">defaultdict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">replacement</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">entry_info</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">manifest_index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry_info</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> was not found in &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;the extraction manifest.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_info</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">])</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">namelist</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> targets missing ZIP &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;entry </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_bytes</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">archive</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">validate_entry_hash</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_bytes</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry_info</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">entry_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_text_cache</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry_text</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">entry_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_bytes</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">decode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">raw_text_cache</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry_text</span>

        <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block_range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_text</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> points outside ZIP &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;entry </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">source_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">expected_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">expected_source_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">expected_fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">source_fragment</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected_fragment</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> in </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> no longer &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;matches the extraction manifest source fragment.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">block_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expected_source</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expected_source</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">block_text</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> expected source &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expected_source</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, but the manifest recorded &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_text</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;replacement_mode&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;whole_block_body&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">rendered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">render_replacement_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replacement_mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">is_identity_replacement</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rendered</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">entry_changes</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">rendered</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">bytes</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">changes</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">entry_changes</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">original</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">raw_text_cache</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">validate_non_overlapping_ranges</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">updated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">apply_changes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">overlays</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">updated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">overlays</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Replacement plans with replacements require an extraction manifest.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">manifest</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">loads</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">coerce_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">schema_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">schema_version</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Unsupported extraction manifest schema version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">schema_version</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">entries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">payload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;entries&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Extraction manifest must contain an entries list.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">payload</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">unique_manifest_xhtml_hrefs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return unique XHTML entry hrefs from an extraction manifest, in order.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;entries&quot;</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">media_type</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;media_type&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">media_type</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">XHTML_MEDIA_TYPES</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;href&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">href</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ordered</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_source_manifest_hash</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">expected_sha</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">sha256_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source EPUB </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> does not match extraction manifest &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;source_sha256.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_manifest_index</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]]:</span>
    <span class="n">indexed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;entries&quot;</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">blocks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;blocks&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">block</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">block_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;block_id&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Manifest block is missing block_id.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">normalized_block_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">normalized_block_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">indexed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Manifest block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">normalized_block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> appears more than once.&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">indexed</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">normalized_block_id</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">indexed</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">detect_duplicate_blocks</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">replacement</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> was supplied more than once.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_entry_hash</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_bytes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bytes</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">entry_info</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">expected_sha</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">entry_info</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;raw_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">sha256_bytes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_bytes</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected_sha</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> targets </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">, but the source entry &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;hash does not match the extraction manifest.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">block_range</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;replacement_mode&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;whole_block_body&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;whole_block_body&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;body_source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;body_source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;text_node_sequence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_start&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_end&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> uses unsupported replacement mode &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">replacement_mode</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> is missing valid source offsets.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> has invalid range </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">expected_source_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">source_fragment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source_fragment&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_fragment</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">source_fragment</span>
    <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;replacement_mode&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;whole_block_body&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replacement_mode</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;text_node_sequence&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">block</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">text</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">render_replacement_text</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">validate_inline_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">html</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">quote</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_inline_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">validate_safe_inline_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">fragment</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="n">UnsafeFragmentError</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">is_identity_replacement</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">block_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_fragment</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">rendered</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">rendered</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">source_fragment</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">block_text</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expected_source</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">replacement</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">expected_source</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">validate_non_overlapping_ranges</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">ordered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">])</span>
    <span class="n">previous_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">block_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">previous_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">ReplacementError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Replacement block </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> overlaps another replacement in &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;ZIP entry </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">previous_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">apply_changes</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">updated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">original</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">replacement_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">_</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">changes</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">reverse</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">updated</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">updated</span><span class="p">[:</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">replacement_text</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">updated</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">updated</span>
</pre></div>
